label: Identifiers and Product Data
description: Core identifiers, manufacturer details, and general product data attributes that uniquely describe the battery and its origin.

label: Labels and Conformity Documentation
description: Attributes covering mandatory labeling symbols, conformity declarations, and compliance test documentation required for regulatory approval.

label: Battery Carbon Footprint
description: Quantitative greenhouse gas emission values across the full battery lifecycle, including per-stage contributions and the overall performance class.

label: Supply Chain Due Diligence
description: Information verifying responsible sourcing practices, third-party audit assurances, and measurable supply chain integrity indices.

label: Materials and Composition
description: Detailed declarations of the chemical composition, critical and hazardous materials, and electrode chemistry used in the battery.

label: Circularity and Resource Efficiency
description: Data supporting end-of-life handling, recycled and renewable content shares, spare parts availability, and waste prevention guidance.

label: Performance and Durability
description: Technical performance parameters covering capacity, energy, voltage, efficiency, lifetime, and operational condition data for the battery.
